_comment: Drop the inner value under the top-level 'mcpServers' key of your MCP client config. Pick ONE template. All templates assume you installed from source: `git clone https://github.com/zhuqingyv/mnemo.git && cd mnemo && pip install -e .`

installed_entry_point._usage: Simplest form. Works when `mnemo-mcp` is on PATH (true after `pip install -e .` in an activated environment).

cursor_stdio._usage: Put under mcpServers in ~/.cursor/mcp.json (or project-level .cursor/mcp.json). Restart Cursor after editing.

claude_desktop_stdio._usage: Put under mcpServers in ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (macOS) or %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json (Windows). Restart Claude Desktop.

sse_shared_backend._usage: Use when multiple clients need to share one mnemo backend. Start server first: `mnemo serve` (listens on 127.0.0.1:8787). See docs/ADVANCED.md.

dev_local_venv._usage: Recommended for development — runs directly from a local clone with an explicit interpreter, independent of PATH. Replace /ABS/PATH/mnemo with your checkout path.
